query:
-- Last 3 pipeline runs with key stats
SELECT 
  id,
  status,
  startedAt,
  completedAt,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, startedAt, completedAt) as durationMins,
  newProjectsFound,
  projectsUpdated,
  contactsEnriched,
  feedErrors,
  totalArticlesProcessed,
  LEFT(errorLog, 300) as errorSummary
FROM pipelineRuns
ORDER BY startedAt DESC
LIMIT 3;
